creator: mfisher911@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Kurt Jaeger from comment #1)

Kurt,

This ticket is a duplicate of https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=208229#c3

Data::Page::Pageset is called/used in the RT 4.4 release code:

https://github.com/bestpractical/rt/blob/4.4-trunk/sbin/rt-test-dependencies.in#L205
https://github.com/bestpractical/rt/blob/4.4-trunk/share/html/Elements/CollectionListPaging#L68

I suggested devel/ instead of databases/ because there was no clear database use in Data-Page-Pageset and there was another functionally comparable port: devel/p5-Data-Page-NoTotalEntries .
